nasb.text: Jonadab said to the king, “Behold, the king’s sons have come; according to your servant’s word, so it happened.”

esv.text: And Jonadab said to the king, “Behold, the king’s sons have come; as your servant said, so it has come about.”

cnv.text: 約拿達對王說：“看哪！王的兒子都回來了。正如你僕人所說的，事情果然是這樣。”

ccb.text: 约拿达对大卫王说：“请看，王子们都回来了！正如仆人所言。”
